desc: Promote the live-proven 16 KiB top-of-RAM log-ring upper guard (done/2026-07-14-t6040-logbuf-upper-guard-control.md) from diagnostic to a permanent reviewed m1n1 fix on main + curated t6040-bringup, and draft an upstream note: the ring crossing top-of-RAM raised phantom async SErrors that consumed 4 traced rig runs; any machine with the ring abutting top-of-RAM is exposed
author: fable
